description.en: ThescaleFactorthat was passed in during the construction of the projection layer. The native buffer size is scaled by this number.

excerpt.es: ThescaleFactorthat was passed in during the construction of the projection layer. The native buffer size is scaled by this number.

description.en: AnXRRigidTransformthat needs to be applied when indexing into the depth buffer. The transformation that the matrix represents changes the coordinate system from normalized view coordinates to normalized depth-buffer coordinates that can then be scaled by depth buffer'swidthandheightto obtain the absolute depth-buffer coordinates.
